summary: Phase 3 UX Standardization Testing PASSED - All 4 migrated pages (ReservationsPage, AdminAgenciesPage, CrmCustomersPage, DashboardPage) verified to use PageShell, DataTable, FilterBar, and StatusBadge design system components correctly. 27/29 tests passed (93.1%). All core UX patterns working as expected.

issues: Shows 'Tenant context bulunamadı' warning - known backend issue for super_admin role, not a frontend bug

critical_code_review_comments: All 4 migrated pages correctly use PageShell with consistent header pattern (title + description + actions)
DataTable component properly renders with sorting, filtering, pagination across all pages
FilterBar with search and dropdown filters working on Reservations, Agencies, and CRM pages
StatusBadge component used for displaying status indicators (active/inactive, payment status, contract status)
All action buttons have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Create/Edit dialogs work correctly with form fields and validation
Empty states display correctly with helpful messages and action buttons
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 UX Standardization complete. All 4 high-impact pages migrated to design system. Minor issue: res-status-summary testid only appears when reservations exist (empty state behavior). Console shows React Router v7 future flag warnings and some 400 API errors - these are backend state issues, not frontend bugs.

DashboardPage.description: PASS - Shows 'Rezervasyon ve operasyon özetini buradan takip edebilirsin.'

ReservationsPage.PageShell_description: PASS - 'Durum akışı, voucher ve tahsilat yönetimi'
ReservationsPage.FilterBar_search: PASS - Search input with placeholder 'PNR veya müşteri ara...'
ReservationsPage.DataTable: PASS - Columns: PNR, Durum, Toplam, Ödenen, Kanal, actions
ReservationsPage.Create_dialog: PASS - Dialog opens with product/customer/date fields
ReservationsPage.res_status_summary: CONDITIONAL - Only renders when reservations exist

AdminAgenciesPage.PageShell_description: PASS - 'Yeni acenta açın, sözleşme süresini tanımlayın ve ardından kullanıcı oluşturun.'
AdminAgenciesPage.KPI_cards: PASS - 4 metrics (Toplam Acenta, Süresi Dolacak, Kısıtlı, Limitli Paket)
AdminAgenciesPage.DataTable: PASS - Shows agencies with Kullanıcılar and Düzenle buttons
AdminAgenciesPage.Create_form: PASS - Form appears with name, parent, dates, payment status fields

CrmCustomersPage.PageShell_description: PASS - 'Müşterileri arayın, etiketleyin ve detayına inin.'
CrmCustomersPage.DataTable: PASS - Columns: Adı, Tip, Etiketler, Son Güncelleme
CrmCustomersPage.Create_dialog: PASS - Form with name, type, email, phone fields

sidebar_navigation.status: WORKING - Links navigate correctly to all pages

design_system_components_verified.PageShell: WORKING - Consistent header pattern across all 4 pages
design_system_components_verified.DataTable: WORKING - Sorting, pagination, row click actions
design_system_components_verified.FilterBar: WORKING - Search + dropdown filters with reset

console_warnings: React Router v7 future flag warnings (v7_startTransition, v7_relativeSplatPath) - informational only
400 API errors for some endpoints - backend state issues (Redis unavailable, tenant context)

mocked_apis.supplier_data: MOCKED - Ratehawk sync adapter uses simulated data
